mapper.select: SELECT b.board_id, b.user_id, b.category, b.title, b.content, b.view_count, b.created_at, b.updated_at, u.name AS author_name, CONCAT(h.dong, ' ', h.ho) AS author_unit, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.board_id AND c.is_deleted = 0) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN household h ON u.household_id = h.household_id WHERE b.is_deleted = 0 AND b.category = #{category} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b WHERE b.is_deleted = 0 AND b.category = #{category}

SELECT b.board_id, b.user_id, b.category, b.title, b.content, b.view_count, b.created_at, b.updated_at, u.name AS author_name, CONCAT(h.dong, ' ', h.ho) AS author_unit, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.board_id AND c.is_deleted = 0) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN household h ON u.household_id = h.household_id WHERE b.board_id = #{id} AND b.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE board_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (user_id, category, title, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{req.category}, #{req.title}, #{req.content})
